name: artifact range read avoids full payload
signal: large text artifact read with offset and limit returns only a bounded window plus reference metadata

name: resource query read avoids full payload
signal: resource URI read with query returns bounded match windows and does not inline the entire source

name: same digest and same range returns unchanged stub
signal: repeated read of the same resource URI, digest, format, and range produces a compact unchanged stub

name: same resource with different range stays visible
signal: same resource URI and digest with a different offset or limit is treated as a distinct bounded read

name: digest change returns changed stub
signal: same resource URI and range with a new digest produces a compact changed stub without replaying full content

name: binary resource returns metadata only
signal: binary payload read returns digest, byte count, content type, and reference metadata without base64 body content
